question: Implement a `BooleanFlag` class that encapsulates a single `bool` value. Overload the unary logical NOT operator (`operator!`) to invert the encapsulated boolean value and return the new value.

test_cases.input: BooleanFlag flag(true); bool res = !flag; std::cout << res << flag.getValue();
BooleanFlag flag(false); bool res = !flag; std::cout << res << flag.getValue();
